song.title: Now That You’re Near
song.author: Marty Sampson
song.lyrics:
[V1] .E F#m E/G# A2 .E A2 I stand before You Lord . C#m7 And give You all my praise . A Your love is all I need . B Jesus You’re all I need [V2] My life belongs to You You gave Your life for me Your grace is all I need Jesus You’re all I need
[P] .C#m A Holding on to You . E B Never letting go . C#m A E B I’m gonna spend eternity with You
[C] .E B Now that You’re near . C#m Everything is different . A Everything’s so different, Lord .E B I know I’m not the same . C#m My life is changed . A2 I want to be with You . E I want to be with You
